Tool "update_apex_class" uses vague action words (update) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
Tool "execute_tooling_query" has dangerous capabilities but is described as a "tool". LLM will underestimate the risk and use it without caution.
Tool "run_tests" description is only 18 chars. LLM will hallucinate capabilities based on the name alone.
Tool "analyze_soql_performance" uses vague action words (perform) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
